about.bio: Hi, I'm Nirmal Sing Nithish N, a software developer with 2 years of professional experience specializing in modern web and mobile application development. I am passionate about creating clean, performant, and responsive user experiences.
about.experienceSubtitle: Full Stack & Mobile developer designing scalable solutions with clean architectures.

projects.title: Featured Project
projects.subtitle: A deep dive into one of my major open-source products.

tabix.title: Tabix Chrome Extension
tabix.desc: Tabix is a lightweight tab management Chrome extension designed to help users efficiently organize, search, and manage browser tabs for improved productivity. It handles thousands of tabs smoothly with visual groups, fuzzy search, and lazy storage.

features.management: Fuzzy-search and filters across open windows
features.groups: Custom collections and one-click tab grouping
features.performance: Hibernation patterns to save system memory
features.sync: Cloud-ready profile or local storage state syncing

tabix.architecture: Engineered with a modular architecture leveraging Chrome's background service workers, clean storage pipelines, and React-based popup overlays.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What clients, founders, and engineering peers say about working with me.

item1.quote: Nirmal is an exceptional developer. His attention to detail, debugging speed, and clean code approach made him a highly valuable asset to our development cycle.
item1.author: Arun Kumar

item2.quote: Our Flutter application was delivered ahead of schedule with zero major bugs. Nirmal's mastery of Clean Architecture is evident in his structural layouts.
item2.author: Sarah Chen

item3.quote: The Tabix Chrome Extension has transformed how our research team manages resources. Beautiful UI, extremely responsive, and extremely optimized.
item3.author: Rajesh Raman
